g.text: epicd Use Cases — View 1/2: Interactive surfaces (Human · AI Agent)
Issue List & Oversight (Human · PLANNED — the new primary surface)
Weakened — deprecated (code kept, hidden from nav)
Agent API (AI Agent · IMPLEMENTED via MCP — subset of CLI)
Base = existing All Tasks page (TaskList.tsx). Extends it with:
add a lane = add a pipeline). lane is NOT a label, NOT a saved filter.
— narrows WITHIN a lane, never defines it;
(4) per-row DRIVER indicator: 👤 awaiting your gate vs 🤖 being worked by
Claude Code (monitor-driven worker) — reads Coordinator runtime state (live via WS);
(5) gate-inbox is FOLDED IN here (needs-human rows), not a separate page.
Behaviour defined by: workitem-lifecycle-state / issue-list-activity / issue-list-sequence.
Backend gap: search-service NormalizedFilters must add
RETIRED in favor of loop-draft STATUS-draft (see View 2 authoring lane):
draft becomes a pipeline STATE (Basic/Epic: Draft→Refining), not a drafts/ folder.
DRIFT "promote" collapses: folder promote (drafts→tasks) is dropped;
weakened; code kept but hidden / to retire
Canonical = code. lane ≡ pipeline_id ONLY (type axis = role, not lane). Full drift table in use-case-model.md
